channel.title: Preventative
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Preventative, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Health Policy Podcast: RFK Jr. Faces Questions from Congressional Committees
item.description: HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. completed appearances before both House and Senate panels, primarily to present the administration's proposed budget priorities.

item.title: Three Nutrients Linked to Stronger Bones and Reduced Fracture Risk
item.description: A new study identifies three dietary nutrients associated with improved bone health, with researchers noting that increasing intake is relatively straightforward.

item.title: Study Links Key Antioxidant to Improved Cellular Longevity
item.description: Researchers have identified a potent antioxidant that may play a significant role in slowing cellular aging, distinguishing it from more commonly studied compounds.

item.title: Social Engagement May Offer Meaningful Relief for Low Mood, Researchers Suggest
item.description: Emerging evidence points to regular social activity as a practical and accessible way to improve mood and mental well-being, with group outings among the suggested options.

item.title: Health Policy Podcast: RFK Jr. Faces Questions from Congressional Committees
item.description: HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. completed appearances before both House and Senate panels, primarily to present the administration's proposed budget priorities.
